name: GH_LibraryLicense
summary: Enumerates the possible library types for GHA assemblies.

enum_values.name: unset
enum_values.summary: Unset library type. You should not return this value.

enum_values.name: expired
enum_values.summary: The license for this library has expired and it can no longer be used.

enum_values.name: alpha
enum_values.summary: This library is an Alpha release.

enum_values.name: beta
enum_values.summary: This library is a Beta release.

enum_values.name: opensource
enum_values.summary: This library is distributed under an open source license.

enum_values.name: trial
enum_values.summary: This library is running in Trial mode.

enum_values.name: commercial
enum_values.summary: This library is running under a Commercial license.

enum_values.name: educational
enum_values.summary: This library is running under an Educational license.

enum_values.name: developer
enum_values.summary: This library is running under a Developer license.

enum_values.name: reseller
enum_values.summary: This library is running under a Reseller license.
